entity_results.verification_reason: The extracted data includes content not present in the source text such as 'Gopal is currently the... Ericsson, Volvo Group, and Airtel announce research collaboration on Digital Twins & XR over 5G Advanced in India' and 'launched our telco grade sovereign cloud'. Also, key terms are fragmented or misattributed, and the AI field starts with a URL but doesn't match the actual press release language. Only partial phrases like 'It gap in India' and 'negative net external debt position' are vaguely correct. Overall, significant portions are unverified or fabricated.

The growth was led by continued focus on portfolio premiumization within the Mobile segment, strong growth momentum in the Homes segment, and consistent delivery by Airtel Business. • India mobile revenue up 8.3% YoY, supported by higher ARPU and strong growth in smartphone data customers. • The Homes business recorded another robust quarter, achieving a YoY revenue growth of 37.3%.
